debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

failed_attempts:
field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  linarith

have : b - a ≠ 0 := by linarith
  field_simp [hδ₁, npos, this] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simplify at hN ⊢
  have : (n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  linarith
field_simp [hδ₁, hab.ne] at hN; rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos), ← div_lt_iff hδ₁] at hN ⊢; linarith

have h : (0 : ℝ) < n := by linarith
  rw [div_lt_iff h]
  field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  linarith [(div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN]

field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  have : (n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  nlinarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab, npos] at hN ⊢
  linarith

have : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  field_simp [hδ₁, hab, this] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁.ne.symm, npos.ne.symm, hab.ne.symm] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁.ne', npos.ne', hab.ne] at hN ⊢
  linarith
field_simplify [hδ₁, hab, (by exact_mod_cast npos : (0 : ℝ) < n)] at hN ⊢; linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simplify [hδ₁.ne', hab.ne] at hN
  exact (div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)).mpr ((lt_div_iff hδ₁).mp (hN.trans_le (by exact_mod_cast hn)))
field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢; linarith
field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢; linarith

field_simp [hδ₁.ne', npos.ne', hab.ne] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff (by exact_mod_cast npos)]
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith
field_simp [hδ₁.ne'] at hN ⊢; linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab] at hN
  have : (0 : ℝ) < n := by exact_mod_cast npos
  field_simp [hδ₁, this] at *
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, hab, npos] at hN ⊢
  linarith
field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at *; linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁, npos, hab] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp at hN
  have : (n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁.ne, hab.ne, (show (n : ℝ) ≠ 0 by linarith)] at hN ⊢
  linarith

field_simp [hδ₁.ne.symm, hab.ne.symm] at hN
  rw [div_lt_iff npos]
  linarith [(div_lt_iff hδ₁).mp hN]

field_simp [hδ₁, hab, npos] at hN ⊢
  nlinarith
